title: agalinis holmiana
intro: Agalinis holmiana, also known as Spiked Agalinis, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, which help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Agalinis holmiana include relieving menstrual cramps, soothing digestive issues, and reducing fever, among others. Herbal preparations of Agalinis holmiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of applications.
